safaris.name: The Ultimate Grand Tour
safaris.tagline: Four parks. Ten nights. The complete Kenya.
safaris.description: Kenya's four greatest wilderness areas woven into one seamless journey. You'll wake to flamingos on Lake Nakuru, photograph elephants beneath Kilimanjaro in Amboseli, track red-dusted herds across the volcanic plains of Tsavo East, and end in the Maasai Mara for the Great Migration. This is the definitive Kenya experience   nothing left out.
highlights: Flamingo & rhino sightings at Lake Nakuru
Elephant photography beneath Kilimanjaro
Red-dusted herds across Tsavo's lava plains
Great Migration river crossings in the Mara
Hot air balloon safari over the Maasai Mara
Maasai village cultural experience
includes: 10 nights full-board accommodation across all 4 lodges
All road transfers and inter-park charter flights
Private 4x4 vehicle and dedicated guide for the full journey
All meals and house beverages throughout
Hot air balloon safari in the Maasai Mara with champagne breakfast
All park entry fees and conservation levies
Nairobi airport transfers

safaris.name: Mara & Samburu   North Meets South
safaris.tagline: The wild north and the open plains. Two Kenyas, one trip.
safaris.description: Three nights in Kenya's rugged, arid north tracking the Samburu Special Five   animals found nowhere else in the country. Then four nights in the Maasai Mara, where the same guide takes you into Big Five territory and onto the migration plains. Two ecosystems that could not be more different, making every single day feel entirely new.
highlights: Samburu Special Five   reticulated giraffe, Grevy's zebra, gerenuk, Beisa oryx, Somali ostrich
Ewaso Nyiro river drives   elephants, crocs, leopards at the water
Night drives in Samburu
Great Migration wildebeest river crossings
Hot air balloon safari over the Mara at dawn
Big Five game drives on open Mara plains
includes: 7 nights full-board accommodation across both lodges
Return charter flights: Nairobi–Samburu–Mara–Nairobi
Private 4x4 and same guide throughout
All meals and house beverages
One night drive in Samburu
Hot air balloon safari in the Mara with champagne breakfast
Samburu community cultural visit
All park fees and conservation levies
All airstrip transfers

safaris.name: The Family Safari Adventure
safaris.tagline: Three parks. Seven nights. Memories your children will never forget.
safaris.description: Designed around families with children   this seven-night package moves from the urban wonder of Nairobi National Park and the David Sheldrick elephant orphanage, into the elephant paradise of Amboseli beneath Kilimanjaro, and ends in the Maasai Mara where the Big Five roam the plains. Paced for families, with child-friendly lodges and dedicated activities at every stop. Children under 12 at 50% off.
highlights: David Sheldrick elephant orphanage and Giraffe Centre in Nairobi
Elephant families at close range beneath Kilimanjaro
Junior Ranger programme at Amboseli
Big Five game drives in the Maasai Mara
Maasai village visit with traditional dances
Campfire ranger storytelling for the whole family
includes: 7 nights full-board accommodation across all 3 lodges
Road transfer Nairobi–Amboseli, light aircraft Amboseli–Mara–Nairobi
Shared 4x4 vehicle with family-specialist guide
All meals and soft drinks
David Sheldrick Wildlife Trust orphanage visit
Giraffe Centre entry
Junior Ranger activity programme at Amboseli
Maasai village cultural visit
All park entry fees (children under 12 at reduced rate)

safaris.name: Amboseli & Tsavo Classic
safaris.tagline: Kilimanjaro elephants in the morning, red giants at dusk.
safaris.description: Two elephant-rich parks that could not look more different. Three nights in Amboseli   green marshlands, white mountain, vast herds drifting through morning mist. Then three nights in the raw open wilderness of Tsavo East where those same animals are coated red by volcanic soil, roaming a landscape that stretches further than the eye can follow.
highlights: Elephant herds silhouetted against Kilimanjaro at dawn
Wetland and marsh game drives in Amboseli
Red-dusted Tsavo elephant herds on volcanic lava plains
Lugard Falls on the Galana River
Walking safari with armed ranger escort
Floodlit waterhole viewing through the night
includes: 6 nights full-board accommodation across both camps
All road transfers: Nairobi–Amboseli–Tsavo–Nairobi
Twice-daily game drives in a shared 4x4
All meals and soft drinks
Guided walking safari in Tsavo East
Maasai guided nature walk in Amboseli
All park entry fees and conservation levies

safaris.name: Rift Valley Adventure Break
safaris.tagline: Cycle, hike, boat, and track across Kenya's most dramatic valley.
safaris.description: Kenya's most active safari break   and the best value in our collection. Two nights cycling and gorge-hiking around Hell's Gate and Lake Naivasha, then three nights tracking rhinos and watching flamingos at Lake Nakuru. No flights needed, no crowds, just big scenery and extraordinary wildlife at a price that works.
highlights: Cycling safari through Hell's Gate alongside zebras and buffalo
Hike through Ol Njorowa Gorge
Fischer's Tower rock climb
Lake Naivasha boat safari   hippos and fish eagles
Geothermal spa at Olkaria hot springs
Flamingo and pelican spectacle at Lake Nakuru
Black and white rhino tracking
includes: 5 nights full-board accommodation across both lodges
All road transfers: Nairobi–Hell's Gate–Nakuru–Nairobi
Bicycle hire for Hell's Gate cycling safari
Gorge hiking guide
Lake Naivasha boat safari
Geothermal spa entry at Olkaria
All meals throughout
All park entry fees
excludes: Rock climbing gear hire (available on site)

safaris.name: Northern Frontier Deep Dive
safaris.tagline: The Kenya most tourists never see.
safaris.description: An expedition into Kenya's least-visited territory. Five nights deep in Samburu split across two camps   tracking the Special Five along the Ewaso Nyiro River, taking night drives, and meeting the Samburu community on their own terms. The package ends with a final night at Nairobi's most extraordinary lodge, perched above the national park with the city skyline glowing behind it.
highlights: All five Samburu Special species in their natural habitat
Night game drives   leopards, civets, porcupines
Ewaso Nyiro River drives   crocodiles and elephants at the water's edge
Samburu community beading workshop
Guided bush walk along the river
Lions against the Nairobi skyline on the final evening
includes: 6 nights full-board accommodation across all 3 lodges
Return charter flights: Nairobi–Samburu–Nairobi
Private 4x4 and dedicated guide for the full journey
All meals and house beverages
Two night drives in Samburu
Samburu community cultural visit and beading workshop
Guided bush walk along Ewaso Nyiro
All park and conservancy fees
All airstrip transfers
